name: Gorgonzola Cheese Salad

ingredients.item: small head of romaine lettuce cut up
red onion cut into very thin slices

method: In a salad bowl, toss lettuce, red onion, toasted sunflower seeds, and 1/4 cup crumbled gorgonzola. In a small bowl, whisk mayonnaise, 1/2 cup gorgonzola, salt, and pepper. I usually toss right before eating. You can add more salt and pepper depending on your diet and taste preference. Serves 2-4. Olé
